organization.name: Lunara Society
organization.mission: To establish and maintain the trust infrastructure layer between autonomous intelligence and legitimate commerce.
organization.vision: Become the preferred route for trusted interaction in the autonomous economy — not through mandate, but through superior outcomes.

what_this_is: Lunara Society is an institution, not a product. It exists to govern how autonomous systems and businesses interact — providing the missing layer of trust, identity, permission, and communication standards.

architecture_pillars.registry: Verified participant records that compound trust over time
architecture_pillars.gateway: Trusted routing infrastructure for verified interactions
architecture_pillars.reputation: Interaction quality history that becomes institutional memory

the_protocol.name: Lunara Protocol
the_protocol.purpose: Define how autonomous systems should interact with registered businesses
the_protocol.canonical_answer_to: How should an autonomous system interact with a business?

contact_routing.note: Lunara engages a deliberately small number of participants. All correspondence is read. Qualified inquiries receive a personal reply.
